changes_made: Replaced verbose general-purpose SKILL.md (180 lines) with minimal script-focused version (20 lines)
Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines) — no longer needed
Added scripts/html2jsonld.py — Python script that extracts FAQ and Product schema from HTML automatically
Simplified skill description to encourage skill loading by devstral-small
Fixed HTML parser bugs: brand extraction from <strong> tags, SKU from <span> tags, description from nested divs
failure_analysis: Remaining failures (~20%) are model-level issues: devstral-small sometimes corrupts tool names by appending '}()' to function names, produces empty responses, or hits API timeouts. These are not addressable through skill optimization.
key_insight: Bundling a Python script is the highest-leverage optimization for SLMs. When devstral-small loads the skill and runs the script, it achieves 100/100 every time. The script eliminates JSON truncation issues and write_file type errors that plagued manual JSON generation.
